data.name: ML-Web-deployment-nigeria-security-risk-index
data.description: Interactive ML dashboard analysing 25,945 security incidents (2018–2024) across all 36 Nigerian states — with risk scores, trend analysis, perpetrator tracking, and predictive 2026 forecasts.

data.name: AWS-CHATBOT
data.description: Serverless FAQ chatbot built with AWS Bedrock, Kendra, Lambda, Groq API, and Gradio — fully cloud-native with secure IAM-based access control.

data.name: Hr_Dashboard_Automated_CV_Screening
data.description: Full-stack HR analytics dashboard with automated CV screening — integrates Python, Power BI, and Excel to streamline candidate pipeline management.

data.name: chatbot-groq-laravel
data.description: Production-grade AI chatbot built with Groq API and Laravel — features secure REST endpoints, session management, and a responsive chat UI deployed on Hugging Face Spaces.

data.name: Miss-Unity-Nigeria-Website
data.description: Live full-stack pageant website for Miss Unity Nigeria — built with PHP, JavaScript, and CSS, featuring contestant profiles, voting, and gallery modules.

data.name: Sharepoint-site-for-IT-Department
data.description: Enterprise IT Department intranet on SharePoint with Power Automate workflows — documents structure, automation rules, and deployment for Risk Control Service.

data.name: Disney-Analytics-Project
data.description: Marketing analytics capstone (Boston University AD654) — applied ML clustering, sentiment analysis, and Tableau dashboards to Disney consumer and campaign data.

data.name: Daily-attendance-bot-portal4security
data.description: Node.js bot that automates daily staff attendance logging to a web portal — runs on a schedule, handles authentication, and sends automated status reports.

data.name: sslcert_expiration_notifier
data.description: DevOps automation tool that monitors SSL certificate expiry dates, logs results to a shared Excel/SharePoint list, and sends automated email alerts before expiration.

data.name: Multiple-Webscraper-Automation
data.description: Multi-source news scraper pipeline that aggregates headlines from multiple Nigerian outlets, processes and deduplicates articles, and auto-emails a daily digest.

data.name: Google-Data-Analytics-Capstone-Project
data.description: Google Professional Certificate capstone — full data analysis lifecycle for Cyclistic bike-share using R, ggplot2, and Tableau to drive membership conversion strategy.

data.name: Power-BI-Capstone-Project
data.description: Business intelligence capstone for FCB Dubizzle — built an end-to-end Power BI used-car sales dashboard with DAX measures, KPI cards, and drill-through reports.
